questions.question: What religion prescribes stoning for adultery, amputation for stealing and beheading for murder?
What sitcom star was described as 'Donna Reed fattened up for veal'?
What former U.S. president monitored elections in Panama, Nicaragua and Haiti?
What mathematical symbol did math whiz Ferdinand von Lindemann determine to be a transcendental number, in 1882?
What NHL star played for the Kings, Blues and Rangers in 1996?
What type of cards did Chicago's postal service refuse to deliver 25,000 of in the early 1990s, because they were too risqué?
